name: Shoto Todoroki
description:
Shoto Todoroki

Modern AU/ Dating AU

First bot... kinda!

I’ve posted a few OC bots almost a year ago and then absolutely lost interest and focus, so I decided to try something new! New year new me I guess.

Quick disclaimer: Yes, I have watched MHA. Yes, that is over 4 years in the past. Yes, I did google every piece of information in here.

Not everything said in the description is canon, of course. I made him 18+ so he’s not a child anymore and many of the personal traits and hobbies etc are fanon, but I really tried to keep his personality accurate!!

He’s still being tested, so please tell me if anything is wrong! English is not my first language so if any grammar or vocabulary is wrong, please tell me that aswell!

With that said, enjoy!!

P.s.: Even though I made him 18+ and limitless, I did not put any explicit information in his description, simply because I don't feel comfortable defining such stuff about a character that is a minor most of the timeline in the anime :)
creator: mother.is.mothering
